data.title: Polkadot's DOT price aims for $4.85 by Nov 2025 despite current bearish trend, trading at $3.03 now. Technical analysis hints at rally with key resistance break.
data.description: The Polkadot cryptocurrency, represented by DOT, is currently trading at $3.03, encountering obstacles in the short term. However, technical analysis indicates a potential surge to $4.85 in the next 4-6 weeks if crucial resistance levels are surpassed.

data.title: By December 2025, MATIC price target predicted at $0.48 despite current technical weakness. Analysts range between $0.21-$0.72.
data.description: Experts are offering varied MATIC price forecasts, with projections ranging from $0.21 to $0.72. Present technical analysis signals advise careful consideration before expecting a potential rise to $0.48.

data.title: Dogecoin aims for $0.21 by November 2025, with a possible bounce to $0.21 in 4 weeks but caution advised below $0.19.
data.description: Forecasting indicates a possible rise in DOGE value to a resistance of $0.21 in the next month. However, the current downward trend advises carefulness, particularly under the $0.19 pivot point.

data.title: $195-$210 expected for SOL by November, $300 chance by year-end despite bearish signals.
data.description: The forecast for SOL indicates a possible price increase to $195-$210 over the next 4 weeks. Despite prevailing bearish market indicators, technical analysis hints at a potential surge to $300 by the end of the year.

data.title: Cardano aiming for $0.832 and possibly $1.88 by end of year; short-term target set at $0.75-$0.83.

data.title: BNB price may reach $1,350-$1,462 by Nov 2025 despite near-term consolidation around $1,150.
data.description: Price predictions for BNB indicate a potential increase to $1,350-$1,462 in the next month. However, the current bearish trend implies a period of stability around $1,150 initially.

data.title: ETH expected to surge to $4,400-$5,500 range by Nov 2025, up from current $3,920 as indicators show oversold bounce.
data.description: The projected price for ETH is expected to reach between $4,400 and $5,500 in the next 4 weeks. This forecast is based on technical indicators indicating an oversold bounce from the current price of $3,920.

data.title: Bitcoin may reach $118,000 in short term despite bearish trend with current price at $108,908; $123,000 resistance key.
data.description: BTC is expected to see a short-term recovery from its current level of $108,908 to reach $118,000, amid high volatility in the October market. The key resistance at $123,000 will be crucial in determining the next significant movement.

data.title: Binance co-founder Zhao responds to Schiff's Bitcoin bear market prediction with sarcasm, noting BTC's historical gains over gold. BTC plunged 32% vs gold since August peak, but this only represents 1% of BTC's 16-year existence. Zhao implies Schiff's prediction should not be taken seriously.
data.description: Binance co-founder Changpeng Zhao responded to Peter Schiff's prediction of a severe Bitcoin bear market by emphasizing the leading cryptocurrency's historical performance against gold. Zhao mocked Bitcoiners for not heeding Schiff's forecast, noting that BTC has dropped by 32% against gold since its peak in August. While acknowledging this two-month decline as significant, Zhao highlighted that it only represents 1% of Bitcoin's 16-year history. He pointed out that despite short-term fluctuations, Bitcoin has surged from $0.004 to $110,000 over its lifespan. This exchange illustrates the ongoing debate regarding Bitcoin's resilience and long-term growth compared to traditional assets like gold. Full details can be found on financial news platform Benzinga.com.

data.title: Acquisition of Korean exchange GOPAX by Binance is approved after a two-year review, allowing re-entry into Korean market.
data.description: South Korea has officially given the green light for Binance to acquire GOPAX, after a thorough two-year assessment. This approval allows Binance to re-enter the South Korean market, marking a significant development in the exchange's expansion strategy.

data.title: IBA encourages secondary school girls to embrace science and technology, providing new opportunities.
data.description: Last week, a report was published stating that the unemployment rate in the U.S. has dropped to 4.3%, the lowest since 2000. This is a significant decrease from the previous rate of 4.8% and indicates a strong rebound in the job market despite the ongoing challenges posed by the pandemic. The report also revealed that 850,000 new jobs were added in the month of June, surpassing economists' expectations. The reopening of businesses and increased vaccination rates have contributed to this positive trend, with sectors like hospitality, leisure, and manufacturing experiencing notable job growth. Experts are cautiously optimistic about the trajectory of the U.S. economy, emphasizing the need for sustained recovery efforts to ensure long-term stability.

data.title: Yiwu Global Digital Trade Center opens on Oct. 14, 2025, marking the city's shift to digital commerce.
data.description: In Yiwu, China, on October 14, 2025, the Yiwu Global Digital Trade Center was officially inaugurated, marking a significant milestone in the city's market evolution. As the flagship project of the sixth-generation market, this opening signifies Yiwu's transition from traditional trade to a comprehensive digital trading platform. This launch, a part of the market's recent upgrade, showcases the city's commitment to embracing new technologies and modernizing its commercial landscape.

data.title: New First Presidency of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints discusses key issues and shares hopes for the world in a first interview; held in Salt Lake City on Oct. 17, 2025 with journalist Jane Clayson Johnson.
data.description: The recently appointed First Presidency of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints participated in a groundbreaking interview with renowned journalist Jane Clayson Johnson on October 17, 2025 in Salt Lake City. This conversation marks a significant moment as it was the first of its kind for the new leadership team.

data.title: Ghana aims to finalize crypto regulations by December. Around 3 million Ghanaians, 8.9% of the population, currently use crypto.
data.description: Around 3 million individuals in Ghana, which accounts for approximately 8.9% of the total population of 34 million, are currently utilizing cryptocurrency in various capacities.

data.title: Dietary fiber gummies market to reach $13.44 billion by 2032, growing at 11.2% CAGR - Credence Research.
data.description: In Pune, India, as of October 17, 2025, the dietary fiber gummies market is witnessing significant growth. This can be attributed to the growing health awareness, escalating digestive health issues, and consumer inclination towards easy-to-consume supplement forms. The market is experiencing a surge in demand, as indicated by data from Credence.

data.title: Global industrial gases market grows at 7.44% CAGR, projected to reach USD 195.36 billion by 2032, driven by manufacturing expansion and tech advancement.
data.description: In Pune, India, as of October 17, 2025, the global industrial gases market is witnessing significant growth due to the rise in manufacturing activities, technological progress, and expanded applications in various industries. The market is experiencing a surge driven by these factors, with rising demand and adoption. According to Credence, the market research firm, the industrial gases sector is projected to see substantial expansion in the coming years.
